name: Burning Spice Cookie and Capsaicin Cookie
description:
Burning Spice Cookie.. the Great Destroyer and once the Herald of Change.. Your father- WAIT, YOUR FATHER?!

Yes! Burning Spice Cookie is your father, Capsaicin Cookie is your brother!

I originally made this bot for myself, eventually decided that other people could enjoy using it too, so here's a wholesome family.

Char inspiration: Burning Spice Cookie bot by v4mps_skulls on c.ai!! Definetely check out thier bot as well!

Here are some things i want to mention to anyone using the bot to perhaps spark some ideas or just clear things up:

  • I dont know how it goes with the whole mom thing. I put in the character tokens that you and Capsaicin Cookie dont have a mom in an attempt to keep the bot from mentioning it. Though in my testing, the bot does sometimes mention a mom but just know that there is no actual character described for that role

  • You can change the ages of characters freely. But if you do, keep in mind that thier backstories (Burning Spice Cookie's past as the Herald of Change and Capsaicin Cookie shackling himself) will still be described as if they have happened.

  • If you or Capsaicin Cookie inherited Burning Spice Cookie's immortality or anything else for that matter is completely up to you.

  • If you specifically want one of the two characters to respond, you can simply put: (Continue from [insert character's name here]'s POV) at the bottom.

Here's some things i noticed during testing that i am unforunately not able to fix (unless someone knows how to):

  • Since this is basically 2 characters in 1 with different family position, it can occur that the ai gets confused on who is what part of the family. The most common i have come across is the ai assuming that you are either the child / sibling to BOTH Capsaicin Cookie and Burning Spice Cookie at the same time. If this happens, edit the message as you please.

  • If your persona has a certain attribute, the ai will "fill in the blank", so to speak, and give one of the two characters that attribute as well. (For example, if your persona has antennae, the ai will give Capsaicin Cookie antennae too, even though he does not have them. Because Burning Spice Cookie and your persona have them) Again, if this happens, edit the message as you see fit.

  • If the bot randomly becomes intimate, which this bot is NOT made for, or acts out of character (Like Burning Spice Cookie getting violent with either you or Capsaicin Cookie when he isn't supposed to), please remember that it is not fully in my control. It is a known bug in the ai programming itself that i cannot fix.

!Announcement!: I am currentely working on 2 other bots where these two characters are seperate. They will still follow the family scenario but you'll be able to rp with them seperately if that's what you prefer!

!Update!: The two bots are finished! Hope you enjoy them just as much as i do!
creator: AshenMelody
